results.title: Argentina produce epic World Cup fightback to beat Egypt
results.description: ATLANTA: Argentina staged a stunning comeback from 2-0 down to avoid a stunning exit at the hands of Egypt and prolong Lionel Messi’s World Cup career with a 3-2 win to reach the q...

results.title: Top Gun Dragstrip hosts nighttime races this weekend
results.description: Championship battles across Top Gun Dragstrip's divisions remain razor-close as drivers prepare for another push to secure season titles during the upcoming race weekend.

results.title: Disabled athletes to make history at CM Punjab Youth Games 2026
results.description: LAHORE - The upcoming CM Punjab Youth Games 2026 will mark a significant milestone in promoting inclusive sports, with athletes with disabilities set to compete alongside students from schools, colleges, universities, non-formal education institutions, religious seminaries and private educational organizations across the.

results.title: Local Hollywood superstar shoots hoops with fans on Nantucket
results.description: Adam Sandler surprised fans with a pickup basketball game on Nantucket during the Fourth of July weekend.
